events.content: "objective": "Add FM-10 (Silent Defaults and Guard-Clause Suppression) to FAILURE-MODES.md, anchoring on PR #1965 round-9/11 retro evidence and external corroboration from daniel.haxx.se 2026-05-11"
"Evidence": "git branch --show-current run before commit, output: fix/fm-10-silent-defaults-failure-mode. Branch created off freshly-pulled main per richard-repo-conventions skill."
"Evidence": "On fix/fm-10-silent-defaults-failure-mode at commit time (verified via git branch --show-current)."
"Evidence": "Single-file FAILURE-MODES.md edit + session log + 91-line addition. Diff verified before commit. PR-size lint reports 3/50 files."

"Evidence": "Knowledge captured in canonical home (FAILURE-MODES.md itself) which is the project's authoritative location for failure-mode taxonomy. FM-10 entry contains full description, trigger, evidence, detection, enforcement pattern; cross-referenced from FAILURE-MODES.md Index. No additional Serena memory file created because the doc itself IS the memory; duplicating would create FM-10's own anti-pattern (parallel sources of truth)."

"Evidence": "FM-10 entry IS the retrospective for PR #1965 round-9/11 fixes. The doc captures the failure pattern, trigger, evidence, and enforcement pattern that retros normally surface. Cross-references .agents/retrospective/2026-05-10-pr-1965-review-axes-convergence.md as primary source."
"outcome": "Identified #1991 (M5 strict parsing), #1992 (M1 ad-hoc len(threads) pattern), #2006 (security NEEDS_REVIEW false positive) as evidence anchors; #1919 as adjacent failure mode."
